review_comment: Good to have a comment here to clarify why the empty array is given (i.e. matching my request for comment above :) )
Could you explain why move the codes from L4418 to here?

The code above `if tableInfo.GetPartitionInfo() != nil` affects flagPartitionProcessor.
`getPossibleAccessPaths` method has a new parameter，which depends on flagPartitionProcessor.

Is global index only supported by dynamic partition prune mode? Or why is only the default tested?
Ah, see hasFlagPartitionProcessor :)
